ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., demographic, socioeconomic) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "data_dictionary" TEXT /* File path to the data dictionary */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the source */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Last date of contact with the source */,
  "lead_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the lead contact person at the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the frequency is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "dictionary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the dictionary belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data dictionary */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data dictionary in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dictionary was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data dictionary */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., TXT, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dictionary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dictionaries_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level of the individual */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the individual */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
